---
title: Classes and Schedule
---

To start, I offer just one type of public class:

## Introduction to Aṣṭāṅga Yoga

Location:  <a href="https://gscparks.com/facilities/the-pavilion/" target="_blank">The Pavilion</a>in Georgetown, KY.

Meeting Times:

* Mondays, 9-10am
* Wednesdays, 9-10am

**Pricing**:  The Pavilion is run by Georgetow/Scott County Parks and Recreation.  Classes are free for Pavilion members.  For non-members the rates are:

* $8 (single class, Scott County resident)
* $10 (single class, non-resident)
* $40 (ten-class pass, resident)
* $40 (ten-class pass, non-resident)
